summary: Testing completed for ImageUploader component and Library image endpoints. All 9 features tested and passed: Backend (7/7 tests) - library image upload, delete, and list with images array. Frontend (all features verified) - ImageUploader dialog opens correctly in 'cover' mode (3:2 aspect) on Project Detail, 'free' mode on Gallery/Blog/Library, drop zone visible, Add Image buttons present on Library entries.

issues: Console warning: Duplicate extension names found: ['link', 'underline'] - minor warning, doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/projects/:id/library - returns entries with 'images' array
Backend: Upload to non-existent entry returns 404
Backend: New entry has empty images array
Backend: GET single entry includes images array
Frontend: Project Detail - upload button opens ImageUploader dialog in 'cover' mode with '3:2' text
Frontend: Gallery - Upload Image button opens ImageUploader dialog in 'free' mode with 'optional' crop text
Frontend: Blog - Add Image button in post dialog opens ImageUploader dialog in 'free' mode
Frontend: Library - entry cards show 'Add Image' button (data-testid='upload-library-image-{entryId}')
Frontend: Library - clicking 'Add Image' opens ImageUploader dialog with drop zone
Frontend: ImageUploader shows drop zone on open (data-testid='image-drop-zone')
critical_code_review_comments: ImageUploader.jsx: Well-structured component with proper mode handling ('cover' vs 'free'), uses react-image-crop and browser-image-compression correctly
LibraryPage.jsx: Properly integrates ImageUploader with uploadingEntryId state to track which entry is receiving the image
library.py: New endpoints follow existing patterns, proper error handling for 404 cases, images stored in /uploads/library/{project_id}/{entry_id}/
library.py models: LibraryEntryResponse correctly includes images: List[LibraryImageResponse] field
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Entry_For_Image_Upload library entry for testing Add Image button
context_for_next_testing_agent: ImageUploader component tested across 4 pages: ProjectDetailPage (cover mode, 3:2 aspect, maxWidth=1200), GalleryPage (free mode, maxWidth=1920), BlogPage (free mode, maxWidth=1600), LibraryPage (free mode, maxWidth=1600). Key data-testids: image-drop-zone, image-file-input, upload-with-crop-btn, upload-skip-crop-btn, image-uploading, upload-image-button (project cover), upload-library-image-{entryId} (library). Backend endpoints: POST/DELETE /api/projects/{pid}/library/entries/{eid}/images. Test entry created: TEST_Entry_For_Image_Upload in project 501bdf7c-900b-4af9-b615-e612dbfa7789.
